subject: [PATCH v7 03/20] nfs_common: add new NOTIFY4_* flags proposed in RFC8881bis

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch adds new NOTIFY4_* flags to the NFS protocol, as proposed in RFC8881bis. These flags allow Linux nfsd to omit information about directory cookies and ordering when providing directory delegations. The changes are based on a working group document that has been stable for over a year, but there is still some risk of future changes. The patch updates several files, including the NFS protocol documentation, the xdr generator code, and the header file for the NFS protocol.
